name: design-review
description: Review frontend design contracts, visual alignment, accessibility, component usage, and design debt.

interface.shortDescription: Review frontend design contracts and UI quality
interface.longDescription: Use Design to inspect DESIGN.md contracts, compare UI implementation with design references, review accessibility and component-library alignment, detect design debt, and capture design-system evidence. The original Qoder DESIGN.md Canvas viewer assets are preserved in this Codex plugin.
defaultPrompt: Run Design QA for this frontend screen
Check this UI for design debt
